_comment: LUNA — Royal League Elite Four (member 3, Psychic) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json / the Cicada scene (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), keeping the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so cutscene/engage_royal_elite_3 opens the battle from the endBack stage. Geometry is reused VERBATIM from the Cicada scene (takehara_leader_intro.json): pull up over the challenger's shoulder, a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to her face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. Theme swapped to Psychic/The Moonless Hall: enchantment-table + amethyst shimmer on entry, an elder-guardian curse at the reveal, a portal-ambient hum at the hold, with witch + enchant particles at the zoom. Luna has NO uuid, so particles fall back to the CHALLENGER-facing offset (^ ^1 ^7) exactly like Cicada. tick 190 keeps the universal levelup swell. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: the particle `execute` positions off the CHALLENGER'S look frame (^ ^1 ^7), a best-effort placement toward where the leader stands — air-verify + nudge the ^-offset and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Moonless Hall arena. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:witch ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:enchant ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
